message:
feat: add panel persistence and proper close flow

- Panels persist on server when client disconnects/reloads
- Client reconnects to existing panels via CONNECT_PANEL message
- New panels created via CREATE_PANEL message
- Close tab sends close_panel via control WS, server destroys panel
- Server closes per-panel WebSocket when destroying panel
- Always maintain at least one tab (create new before closing last)
- Removed welcome screen (no longer needed)
